name: CLX - LUXI Public Confirm Bid v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. PUBLIC. After the bidder confirms the card hold on the page, verifies the PaymentIntent is authorized and registers a card-backed proxy/auto-bid. Body: { auction_id, handle, max_cents, payment_intent_id }. Needs STRIPE_SECRET_KEY.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, max_display: $('Shape').item.json.max_display, leading: $('Shape').item.json.leading, new_high_display: $('Shape').item.json.new_high_display }) }}
